title: Lee Pickler
content:
{{Top|rwp}}
'''Lee Pickler''' is the author of a number of [[Living Force (roleplaying campaign)|Living Force]] adventures as well as the [[Child of Light saga|''Child of Light'' saga]].

{{Bio-stub}}

==''Star Wars'' bibliography==
*''[[Avatar Rising]]''
*[[Child of Light saga|''Child of Light'' saga]]
**''[[Child of Light]]''
**[[Soulsaber (adventure)|''Soulsaber'']]
**[[Light and Dark (adventure)|''Light and Dark'']]
*''[[The Price of Business]]''
*''[[Blinking Eyes trilogy]]''
**''[[Halves]]''
**''[[Holes]]''
**''[[Peaces]]'' {{C|Associated interactive}}
*''[[Twi'light Storm]]''
